basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI)
basic_details.short_information: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) Recruitment 2026: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 1 Project Assistant-II posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Project Assistant-II: B.Sc. from a recognized University. Experience, where required, will be counted from the date after acquiring minimum educational qualification. Dissertation/ Thesis work done during academic period will not be counted as experience. Time spent in acquiring higher qualification will not be counted as an experience over essential qualification.

salary_details.details: Rs. 20,000/- + HRA Increment of 15% after 3 years of experience in the same project

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Assistant-II.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant-II post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview, and the interview is scheduled for 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the required qualification for Project Assistant-II?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is a B.Sc. degree from a recognized University.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant-II post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 20,000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q7. Is there any increment in salary?
faq.answer: Yes, there is a potential increment of 15% after 3 years of experience in the same project.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the interview location?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at CSIR NEERI, Nagpur, Maharashtra, 440020.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring a passport-size photo, Aadhaar card, 10th, 12th, and Graduate marksheets, Degree certificate, and a filled application form.
